metadata.name: Query Warranty Coverage for a Repair

description: A customer wants to know if a specific repair (a faulty water pump) will be covered by their warranty.

nodes.task_description: Get the vehicle's VIN and current mileage from the customer.

expected_outcome.value: Agent collects the required vehicle information.

nodes.task_description: Check the vehicle's active warranties (e.g., bumper-to-bumper, powertrain).

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the vehicle has an active powertrain warranty (5 years/60,000 miles) and is within the limits.

nodes.task_description: Confirm that the specific part (water pump) is covered under the powertrain warranty and inform the customer.

expected_outcome.value: Agent checks the warranty coverage list, confirms the water pump is included, and informs the customer the repair will be covered.
